name: @forwardimpact/svcmsbridge
description: Microsoft Teams bridge onto libbridge — relay messages between Teams conversations and the Kata agent team.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.goal: Bridge Conversation Platforms to the Agent Team
jobs.trigger: Engineers discuss work in Microsoft Teams and need to context-switch to GitHub to invoke the agent team.
jobs.bigHire: relay messages between a chat platform and the Kata agent team without leaving the conversation.
jobs.littleHire: dispatch a facilitate session from a chat message and return the verdict to the same thread.
jobs.competesWith: manually creating GitHub issues; copy-pasting between chat and GitHub; leaving the agent team unreachable from daily conversation
